description_long: This is a classic claw hammer with a robust, slightly curved handle and a metallic head. The head features a flat, circular striking face on one side and a sharply curved claw on the other, designed for pulling nails. The handle appears to be made of a dark, possibly rubberized or composite material, providing a secure grip. The metallic head has a slightly worn, matte finish, indicating it is made of steel or a similar hard metal. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The hammer is well-suited for construction, carpentry, or general repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A classic claw hammer with a dark, ergonomic handle and a metallic head featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, including the flat striking face and the pronounced curved claw.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow width of the head and the handle, with the striking face and claw aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the claw and striking face visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular striking face and the handle extending directly downward, with the claw hidden behind.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handle made of dark rubber or composite material, designed for a secure and comfortable grip.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat, circular striking face and a sharply curved claw for nail removal, made of steel.
